query_normalized: predicting amine reactivity using graph neural networks and public databases chemistry
rationale: The paper proposes a general heterogeneous graph neural network architecture (MECCH) for node classification and link prediction on generic datasets, but it does not address the specific domain of amine reactivity, chemical properties, or the use of public chemistry databases. While it falls under the broad category of GNNs, it fails to satisfy the criteria for inclusion as it does not measure the specific biological/chemical mechanism, apply the method to the chemical domain, or serve as a foun
